runtime_agents.description:
Produces a synchronized multi-timeframe consensus view.

    Instead of every AI looking at every timeframe independently,
    this agent produces a single unified view.

    Stage 7 rule: Downstream modules read this single consensus.
runtime_agents.compute_signature: async compute(symbol: str, timeframe: Timeframe, repo) -> TAOutput

runtime_agents.description:
Publishes a single synchronized technical snapshot.

    Stage 7 rule: Downstream components work from the same consistent view.
runtime_agents.compute_signature: async compute(symbol: str, timeframe: Timeframe, repo) -> TAOutput

runtime_agents.description:
Aggregates all options metrics into a single 0DTE intelligence snapshot.

    Stage 8 rule: This agent reads from the Options Plugin Manager (which
    has loaded all 40+ plugins) and produces a single snapshot for
    downstream AI Decision Agents.

    Usage:
        agent = ZeroDTEIntelligenceAgent(plugin_manager)
        snapshot = await agent.compute_snapshot("SPY", input_data=...)
runtime_agents.compute_signature: async run() -> IntelligenceSnapshot

runtime_agents.description:
Computes the Market DNA from all available market data.

    Stage 9 rule: Downstream AI (Forecast, Probability, Supervisor) consumes
    this single object instead of querying dozens of individual plugins.

    Usage:
        agent = MarketDNAAgent()
        dna = await agent.compute_dna(
            quotes={"SPY": {...}, "ES": {...}, "VIX": {...}, ...},
            returns={"SPY": [...], "ES": [...], ...},
        )
runtime_agents.compute_signature: async run() -> IntelligenceSnapshot

runtime_agents.description:
Tracks upcoming market-moving events.

    Usage:
        radar = CatalystRadarAgent(event_bus=bus)
        radar.add_catalyst(CatalystEvent(
            event_id="c1", name="CPI Release",
            scheduled_time=datetime.now(timezone.utc) + timedelta(hours=2),
            category=NewsCategory.ECONOMIC,
            importance=EventImportance.CRITICAL,
        ))
        upcoming = radar.get_upcoming(time_horizon="today")
runtime_agents.compute_signature: async run() -> IntelligenceSnapshot

runtime_agents.description:
Produces ForecastDNA from the 4 DNA objects + model plugins.

    Usage:
        agent = ForecastDNAAgent()
        agent.set_models([lstm_model, xgboost_model, rule_model])
        dna = await agent.compute_forecast(
            symbol="SPY",
            technical_dna={...},
            options_dna={...},
            market_dna={...},
            narrative_dna={...},
        )
runtime_agents.compute_signature: async run() -> IntelligenceSnapshot

runtime_agents.description:
Produces Trade DNA from the 5 DNA objects.

    Stage 12 rule: Does NOT execute trades. Produces structured
    Trade Intelligence for dashboard, reports, and future execution.
runtime_agents.compute_signature: async run() -> IntelligenceSnapshot

runtime_agents.description:
Produces Operations DNA from all platform health signals.

    Usage:
        agent = OperationsDNAAgent()
        agent.update_subsystem("data_collection", online=True, cpu=45)
        agent.set_dna_objects(
            technical="bullish", options="bearish", market="neutral",
            narrative="bullish", forecast="bullish", trade="watch",
        )
        dna = await agent.compute_operations_dna()
runtime_agents.compute_signature: async run() -> IntelligenceSnapshot

ta.adx.name: ADX

logic_evidence.description: ADX must be between 0 and 100
ADX in strong trend should be > 20 (trending)
ADX returns low confidence with insufficient bars

ta.atr.name: ATR

logic_evidence.description: ATR must be a positive number
ATR on flat series should be very small (near 0)

improvement_suggestions: Math correctness 50% below 80% threshold — verify formula against pandas-ta reference

logic_evidence.description: Bollinger output must contain upper, middle, lower, percent_b
Bollinger bands must satisfy: lower <= middle <= upper
percent_b should be finite (can be < 0 or > 1 in extremes)

ta.ema.name: EMA

logic_evidence.description: EMA value matches manual calculation within 0.01 tolerance
EMA returns low confidence or None when insufficient bars
EMA on flat series should equal the flat price
EMA output is a finite positive number

failure_cases: ema_flat_series: EMA=464.8578, expected≈450.0 for flat series
improvement_suggestions: Math correctness 50% below 80% threshold — verify formula against pandas-ta reference
Logic correctness 50% below 70% threshold — review failed scenarios

ta.macd.name: Macd

logic_evidence.description: MACD output must contain macd, signal, histogram keys
MACD line should be positive in strong bullish trend
MACD line should be negative in strong bearish trend
Histogram should equal MACD - signal

improvement_suggestions: Math correctness 50% below 80% threshold — verify formula against pandas-ta reference

ta.rsi.name: RSI

logic_evidence.description: RSI value must be between 0 and 100
RSI in strong bullish trend should be > 50 (momentum up)
RSI in strong bearish trend should be < 50
RSI returns low confidence with insufficient bars
